name: Xbox 360
description: Microsoft's HD console platform that defined Xbox Live, achievements, Xbox Live Arcade, and the 2000s western console ecosystem.

eras.title: HD Launch Era
eras.description: Early HD console period establishing Xbox Live, achievements, and Microsoft’s lead over PS3.

eras.title: Xbox Live Arcade Era
eras.description: Digital games, indie breakthroughs, and online-first console culture become core to the platform.

eras.title: Kinect and Long Tail Era
eras.description: Kinect broadens the audience while the platform continues receiving major late-generation releases.
